evals.prompt: How do I set up a many-to-many relation between posts and tags in Directus? I need the full step-by-step
evals.expected_output: Complete M2M workflow with junction collection, fields, alias fields, relations
expectations: Creates a junction collection (e.g. posts_tags) with hidden meta
Creates two uuid fields in junction (posts_id, tags_id)
Creates alias fields on both parent collections with list-m2m interface
Sets meta.special to m2m on alias fields
Creates relations with junction_field and one_field in meta
Uses CASCADE on_delete for junction relations

evals.prompt: What field type should I use for a featured image on my posts collection?
evals.expected_output: UUID type, file-image interface, special:[file], relation to directus_files
expectations: Specifies uuid type for the field
